name: ESGEN Acquisition Corporation Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: ESGEN Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. These companies do not have an existing business. ESGEN Acquisition Corporation is focused on businesses that provide products, services, technologies and other solutions that support environmental sustainability.
